title: AICoderDichotomousExportRequest

projectKey.description: Key of target AI Coder project which data should be exported into Excel file

removeEmptyColumns.description: Removes empty columns from the report (i.e. columns that don't have any 1 value in its cells).

useAverageSentimentPerRow.description: Adds a column with the average sentiment per row.

description: Contains request data of the exporting to dichotomous report file task
